title: Widdop 4' x 4' - Bambino Resin Baby Boy Photo Frame CG1634
description: Celebrate your beautiful new addition with this 4' x 4' 'Baby Boy' photo frame. From Bambino - keeping the earliest memories alive forever.This moulded white border frame features luxury silver and gold starry night border detail with an adorable teddy bear holding a gold heart icon. Above the aperture is a hand painted soft blue 'Baby Boy' title. Includes a luxury grey velveteen standing strut.Complete with Bambino's luxury signature silver foiled lidded gift box. Product Details Brand : Widdop Height (cm) : 15.5 Width (cm) : 15.5 Depth (cm) : 2 Weight (kg) : 0.29 Colour : Blue Finish : Polyresin - Handpainted Type : Photo Frames
